name: RedisCache
description: High-performance Redis caching layer for accelerating dynamic Database Queries.

settings.name: host
settings.label: Redis Host
settings.description: IP address or hostname of your Redis server.

settings.name: port
settings.label: Redis Port
settings.description: Port number of your Redis server.

settings.name: password
settings.label: Redis Password
settings.description: Authentication password (leave entirely blank if none).

settings.name: database
settings.label: Redis Database Index
settings.description: The specific Redis database index to use (0-15).

settings.name: ttl
settings.label: Cache TTL (seconds)
settings.description: Time to live for fetched content queries. Lower this if content needs to rotate out based on chron jobs.
